Short description.

The planet of danger. The planet of eternal frost. The planet of harsh temperament. And the planet with the most tempting trash cans... Others volunteered to solve their problems, if they don't need your help, freak them all! Better for you. Although in any case, this activity was not chosen by your will for all your free time. Well, now you need to show how good you are at digging in the trash!
